zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela LONGESPEE於1217年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury41歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury31歲。她去世於1297年在英國英格蘭享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela LONGESPEE于1217年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾維可姆时，她的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury41岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury31岁。她去世于1297年在英国英格兰享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德。

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela LONGESPEE was born in 1217, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 41 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 31. She died in 1297, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela LONGESPEE est née en 1217, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 31 ans. Elle est décédée en 1297, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela LONGESPEE 1217 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 41 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 31. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 80 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela LONGESPEE è nata il nel 1217 nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 31 anni. Morì nel 1297, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela LONGESPEEが1217年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは41歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは31歳であった。彼女は1297年にイギリスイギリスで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela LONGESPEE(이)가 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1297년 영국 잉글랜드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela LONGESPEE nasceu em 1217, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 31 anos. Ela faleceu em 1297, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela LONGESPEE родилась в 1217 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 31. Она умерла в 1297 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela LONGESPEE nació en 1217, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 31 años. Murió en 1297, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
